2025-26 New Mexico Lobos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 26-11 (13-7, 3rd in MWC MBB)

Coach: Eric Olen

PS/G: 81.2 (61st of 365)

PA/G: 70.9 (98th of 365)

SRS: 14.27 (47th of 365)

SOS: 5.10 (90th of 365)

ORtg: 114.8 (75th of 365)

DRtg: 100.2 (42nd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +35000
